pi_items.source: setup_task.sh mkdir command and export_result.sh search directory
Python rasterio count of base Landsat tif (4 bands) + 2 required filter bands

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real Landsat multispectral image downloaded from the opengeos repository covering a portion of California. The source image has been verified using python rasterio to contain 4 spectral bands. The task requires applying two spatial filters (edge detection and smoothing) resulting in at least 6 total bands in the output BEAM-DIMAP file located in /home/ga/snap_projects, and an exported GeoTIFF located at /home/ga/snap_exports/filtered_landsat.tif. These paths and requirements strictly match the setup scripts and export checks.
